text.title: Earned Value Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (baselines_exist, reporting_cadence, project_value_band) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: All three baselines (scope, schedule, cost) approved AND frozen?

conclusion.verdict: apply full EVM with CPI/SPI/EAC every period
cadence too sparse for EVM; use milestone tracking
EVM is undefined without baselines; freeze them or pick different method

text.example: baselines_exist=true → reporting_cadence=monthly → apply full EVM (rule baselines-frozen).
